source: Community-measured Strix Halo ranges (COSTROID-NEXT.md §5.2). ESTIMATED assumptions, never measured (R10) — confirm on real hardware (M3b). Dated, stamped, overridable (R8): override via `costroid bench` flags or the [power] config section.

hardware_profiles.description: AMD Strix Halo / Ryzen AI Max+ 395 / Radeon 8060S iGPU (gfx1151, RDNA3.5), 128 GB unified memory, ~215 GB/s — inference is memory-bandwidth-bound.
